name: GMK CYL Pandemonium
description: DeltaKeyCo's Berserk eclipse-themed Cherry-profile doubleshot ABS set. Dark near-black base with translucent blood-red legends. Eight storefronts globally: DeltaKeyCo (primary), Prototypist (APAC), Bowl Keyboards (UK), and five regional partners. Base and novelty kits plus deskmat. June 1–July 1 2026.
